PROOF OF SERVICE RE: MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN OPPOSITION TO DEFENDANT PLANT INSULATION COMPANY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR, IN THE ALTERNATIVE, SUMMARY ADJUDICATION; DECLARATION OF KIMBERLY J. CHU; RESPONSE TO DEFENDANT PLANT INSULATION COMPANY'S SEPARATE STATEMENT OF UNDISPUTED MATERIAL FACTS; SEPARATE STATEMENT OF DISPUTED MATERIAL FACTS (TRANSACTION ID # 21823243) FILED BY PLAINTIFF VENTURINO, BENNY

LAW AND MOTION 301, THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. AFTER THE ARGUMENT, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT PLANT INSULATION COMPANY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. DEFENDANT SHIFTS THE BURDEN OF PRODUCING EVIDENCE BASED ON PLAINTIFF'S RESPONSES TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES AND DEPOSITION TESTIMONY. PARAGRAPH 9 OF THE MORRIS DECLARATION IS NOT ADMITTED. PLAINTIFF RAISED A TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT BASED ON PLAINTIFF'S DECLARATION THAT IS NOT BARRED BY D'AMICO AND THAT AY DECLARATIONS. MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS GRANTED AS TO FALSE REPRESENTATION AND PUNITIVE DAMAGES AND DENIED AS TO THE OTHER CAUSES OF ACTION. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR: 8189 (301/PJM)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Oct-17-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
BRETTON J. MORRIS, ESQ.(LEWIS BRISBOIS BISGAARD & SMITH LLP), (415)262-8573, FOR DEFENDANT/MOVING PARTY, PLANT INSULATION COMPANY
JEFFREY WEHR, ESQ.(BRAYTON PURCELL, LLP), (415)898-1555, FOR PLAINTIFF/OPPOSING PARTY, BENNY VENTURINO

THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. AFTER THE ARGUMENT, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT PLANT INSULATION COMPANY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. DEFENDANT SHIFTS THE BURDEN OF PRODUCING EVIDENCE BASED ON PLAINTIFF'S RESPONSES TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES AND DEPOSITION TESTIMONY. PARAGRAPH 9 OF THE MORRIS DECLARATION IS NOT ADMITTED. PLAINTIFF RAISED A TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT BASED ON PLAINTIFF'S DECLARATION THAT IS NOT BARRED BY D'AMICO AND THAT AY DECLARATIONS. MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS GRANTED AS TO FALSE REPRESENTATION AND PUNITIVE DAMAGES AND DENIED AS TO THE OTHER CAUSES OF ACTION. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR: 8189 (301/PJM/AY)
